response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to event-driven architectures and AI-agent tooling, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech infrastructure depth, or proven scaling of multi-agent AI systems in production at the required scale. His background is more aligned with senior engineering than CTO-level strategic and organizational leadership.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP at re:cinq) and event-driven architectures (GISCollective platform).
Diverse technical background spanning distributed systems, real-time data, and tooling development across multiple languages.
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective used by NGOs, low-latency microservices at Sociomantic).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience; roles are primarily individual contributor or senior engineering positions.
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing internal technical leadership layers.
Fintech-specific experience (credit systems, regulatory compliance) is minimal and not highlighted as a core competency.
